name: Interactive flow testing with multi-step form
description: Verifies that the skill produces a correct interactive Playwright test suite for a multi-step checkout form with network mocking, proper locators, and isolated contexts.
input: Write Playwright tests for a 3-step checkout form: shipping address, payment method, order confirmation. The form has client-side validation, a loading spinner on submit, and calls POST /api/orders. Mock the API. Use Page Object Model.

assertions.description: Must include network interception via page.route() for the /api/orders endpoint
Must use role-based locators as the primary selector strategy
Must define Page Object Model classes for at least the checkout page
Must not use arbitrary timeout waits — should rely on auto-waiting or explicit condition waits
Must include explicit assertions using Playwright expect() for each step transition and final confirmation

name: Visual regression setup with accessibility audit
description: Verifies that the skill configures visual regression testing with proper baselines, diff thresholds, dynamic masking, and integrates axe-core accessibility scanning.
input: Set up visual regression testing and accessibility audits for a dashboard page. The dashboard has a dynamic timestamp, a user avatar, charts that animate on load, and a sidebar navigation. It must pass WCAG 2.1 AA. Configure for Chromium and Firefox.

assertions.description: Must use Playwright's built-in screenshot comparison via toHaveScreenshot()
Must mask dynamic content (timestamp, avatar) to prevent false-positive visual diffs
Must configure explicit diff thresholds rather than relying on defaults
Must integrate axe-core via @axe-core/playwright for accessibility scanning
Must configure axe-core tags to target WCAG 2.1 AA compliance level
